notes: Production evidence for v0.5.0. Promotes v0.5.0-rc.1. All RC gates passed. v0.5 operational maturity: end-user self-service portal, audit log visibility, data export/retention workflows, carrier health dashboard, and broader lifecycle consistency (outbound route draft/publish, parking-lot and conference-room active-call safety checks). DB migrations 0053 and 0054 applied cleanly. Full v0.5.x operational maturity release shipped.
helm_lint: PASSED — 1 chart linted, 0 chart(s) failed. All 8 resource kinds render (Secret, ConfigMap, PVC, Service, Deployment×3, Job). enlogy@10.0.0.32, commit 6df5fab.
docker_compose_prod_smoke: PASSED — /health returned db:ok, /setup returned HTTP 200. enlogy@10.0.0.32, image managecallai-api:local tagged v0.5.0.

rotation_rehearsal.note: Automated precondition checks pass. Full live secret rotation requires a production deployment with rotating secrets. JWT and runtime-token manual rotation steps are operator-performed during live deployments.

migrations: v0.5.0 applies 2 new migrations on top of v0.4.0: 0053_self_service_policy_extensions.sql and 0054_outbound_routes_draft_lifecycle.sql. Run `pnpm db:migrate` before starting the v0.5.0 API container.
production_soak: Inherited from v0.3.0. No call-path or hot-path changes in v0.5.0. All v0.5 changes affect admin/end-user UI surfaces, audit-log-adjacent endpoints, and the outbound_routes desired-state table.
production_slo: Inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/runtime-slo-evidence-2026-06-03.json). No hot-path changes in v0.5.0.
carrier_interop: Inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/carrier-interop-evidence-fusionpbx-2026-06-02.json). No carrier or call-path changes in v0.5.0.
security_review: CodeQL run 26993406195 clean. FreeSWITCH hardening 0 findings (smoke run 26993419772). Branch coverage 80.35% (above 80% threshold). Self-service endpoints are capability-gated and tenant-scoped. No new privileged API surfaces introduced.
rollback_plan: Roll back to v0.4.0 image. Reverse migrations 0054 (remove draft constraint from outbound_routes) and 0053 (remove policy columns). Low risk — no call-path schema changes.

operator_signoff.name: Fatih Kucukpetek
operator_signoff.notes: Production signoff for v0.5.0. All 5 v0.5.x operational maturity buckets delivered and verified. All RC gates pass. Rotation rehearsal automated checks pass on enlogy@10.0.0.32.

remaining_operator_steps: Make GHCR packages public: GitHub → Profile → Packages → Change visibility to Public for each managecallai-* package
Configure DOCKERHUB_USERNAME + DOCKERHUB_TOKEN repo secrets for Docker Hub publishing
Run pnpm db:migrate on production DB to apply migrations 0053 and 0054
Live JWT secret rotation in production (pnpm rotation:rehearsal with ROTATION_* env vars)
